message.content:
@startuml
title フィールド選択シーケンス図

actor "ユーザ" as User
participant "Manager" as Manager
participant "FieldModel" as FieldModel
participant "FieldSelectPresenter" as Presenter
participant "FieldSelectView" as View

User -> Manager

Manager -> FieldModel : (Child Component)
Manager -> Presenter : Instantiate()

Manager -> Presenter : Initialized()
activate Presenter

Presenter -> FieldModel : Fields
activate FieldModel
FieldModel --> Presenter
deactivate FieldModel

Presenter -> View : Initialized()
activate View
View --> Presenter
deactivate View
deactivate Presenter

opt [フィールド選択時]\nフィールド選択
  Manager -> View
  View -> Presenter : OnSelectedField()
  activate Presenter
  Presenter --> View
  deactivate Presenter
end

opt [ランダムボタン押下時]\nランダムボタン押下
  Manager -> View
  View -> Presenter : OnSelectedRundom()
  activate Presenter
  Presenter -> Presenter
  Presenter --> View
  deactivate Presenter
end

@enduml
